{{CargoOrgan
|name=Laser Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10679
|idx=36
|description="When those eyes open, blinding laser beams tear through matter and unleash a massive radiation field. Contamination levels: unmeasured."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=Before round start, activate the Radiation Field, reducing the enemy's DEF by 36% this round!
|hp=1500
|def=127
|atk=116
|rush=238
|gene1=RUSH CRIT DMG +5%
|gene2=In Gene Sims, Wind DMG +120
|gene3=In Gene Sims, CRIT DMG +10%
|gene4=Ignore Wind RES +60
|gene7=In Gene Sims, CRIT DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
